mapper.insert: insert into pp_task (room_id, person_name, person_address, total_number, completed_number, received_number, integral, status, begin_time,created_time) values (#{pt.roomId}, #{pt.personName}, #{pt.personAddress}, #{pt.totalNumber}, 0, 0, #{pt.integral}, #{pt.status}, #{pt.beginTime}, now())
mapper.sql: id, room_address, room_id, total_number, computed_number, person_address, person_name
mapper.update: update pp_task set completed_number = completed_number + 1, received_number = received_number - 1, status = CASE WHEN completed_number >= total_number THEN '${SUCCESS}' ELSE status END where id = #{id} and completed_number < total_number and received_number >= 0
update pp_task set received_number = received_number - 1 where id = #{id} and received_number >= 0
update pp_task set received_number = received_number + 1 where id = #{id} and received_number <total_number
mapper.select: select t.* from pp_task t where not exists ( select 1 from pp_task_claim c where c.room_id = t.room_id and c.device_id = #{deviceId} ) order by t.begin_time asc limit 1 for update
SELECT * FROM pp_task WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
